title: astragalus glaux
intro: Astragalus glaux, also known as the sweet or white milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus glaux include its potential to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In traditional herbal medicine, Astragalus glaux is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
